params.playerHandSnapshot: { cards: Array<Card>, total: int, isSoft: bool, isPair: bool, canDouble: bool, canSplit: bool }

notes: section-5 (hint-and-review) calls recommendation() on Hint button click, passing the CURRENT player hand snapshot from state-machine and the visible dealer upcard. The single returned action label is rendered as the hint, with no additional reasoning text per IP4 lock. Same function signature as the strategy-table -> game-state-machine contract; identical pure lookup semantics.
